description_long: This object is a long firearm with a wooden stock and a black metal barrel, equipped with a mounted telescopic sight. The stock is full-sized and ergonomically shaped, with a smooth finish and a slight curve at the butt. The barrel is slender and extends well beyond the wooden fore-end, with no visible ribbing or venting. The action area features a trigger guard and a bolt handle, indicating a bolt-action mechanism. The telescopic sight is mounted securely on top, with adjustment knobs and a long eyepiece. The overall design is streamlined and functional, suitable for precision shooting.
description: A bolt-action shotgun with a wooden full stock, black metal barrel, and a mounted telescopic sight.
description_view_0: Front view showing the narrow barrel and the alignment of the telescopic sight above the action.
description_view_1: Side view displaying the full length of the wooden stock, the bolt handle, trigger guard, and the mounted scope.
description_view_2: Rear view highlighting the butt of the stock and the scope's eyepiece, with the barrel extending forward.
description_view_3: Opposite side view showing the bolt handle, trigger guard, and the full profile of the stock and barrel.
attribute_barrel_configuration: single-barrel, no visible ribbing or venting, long barrel
attribute_trigger_guard_design: rounded, medium-sized trigger guard with a smooth contour and no finger grooves
